name: /doctor --explain reports severity warn when the profile sets the rule to the string warn
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: warn\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_severity=warn' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_will_run=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
